sentences.arabic: قَدِمَ مُوَظَّفٌ جَدِيدٌ اسْمُهُ فَيْصَلٌ إِلَى الشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: U kompaniju je stigao novi radnik po imenu Fejsal.
sentences.translationEn: A new employee named Faisal joined the company.

sentences.arabic: رَحَّبَ بِهِ الزُّمَلَاءُ بِحَفَاوَةٍ وَعَرَّفُوهُ عَلَى الْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Kolege su ga toplo primile i upoznale ga s mjestom.
sentences.translationEn: The colleagues welcomed him warmly and introduced him to the place.

sentences.translation: Dali su mu sto i objasnili mu njegove zadatke.
sentences.translationEn: They gave him a desk and explained his tasks to him.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ فَيْصَلٌ الْجَمِيعَ وَبَدَأَ أَوَّلَ يَوْمٍ لَهُ بِنَشَاطٍ.
sentences.translation: Fejsal je zahvalio svima i počeo svoj prvi dan aktivno.
sentences.translationEn: Faisal thanked everyone and started his first day with energy.
